parsed_output.justification: Jacob claimed to be the Seer and asserted that a Werewolf was in the center, a common bluff used by Werewolves to convince the Village that they can win by not eliminating anyone. This manipulation, combined with his effort to guide the group toward a 'no-kill' outcome, strongly suggests he is the Werewolf.
